overall.description: A slow first-person walk through a dense, foggy forest at night, approaching a metal radio tower visible through the mist. The scene has a dark, ominous atmosphere characteristic of cinematic horror video games, with an overhead light source cutting through the heavy fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy forest trail with radio tower

agents.ego_description: slowly walking forward through the foggy forest path toward the distant radio tower

entered.detail: tall metal lattice tower visible through the fog in the distance
single light source hanging above the path illuminating the fog
tall coniferous tree trunk framing the left side of the path
tall coniferous tree trunk framing the right side of the path
narrow dirt trail winding through the dense forest

segments.scene_description: The camera moves slowly forward along a narrow dirt path through a dense, foggy forest at night. A metal radio tower looms in the distance through the mist, while an overhead light fixture casts an eerie glow. Tall pine trees frame the path on both sides, creating a claustrophobic and ominous atmosphere typical of horror game environments.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic forest that gradually reveals a looming industrial structure. It begins by gliding slowly forward along a narrow dirt path, where tall pine trees frame the view and create an ominous sense of enclosure. As the camera advances, the dense night fog begins to part, allowing the eerie glow of an overhead light fixture to cut through the mist. The scene then opens up to reveal a metal radio tower looming in the distance, drawing the viewer deeper into the dark, atmospheric environment.
